title: Was Unit 05 one of the ADAMS
display_title: Was Unit 05 one of the ADAMS
wikitext:
[]: Was Unit-05 one of the ADAMS?             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Jan 29, 2014 2:16 pm Rewatching 2.22 I realised I'd never given much thought to this shot Two crosses; one for the Third Angel, one for Unit-05? Thinking about it, no other destroyed Eva; in the original show not Unit-00 or Unit-02, and not in the Rebuild with Unit-04. So why the two crosses? Unit-05 is one of the four ADAMS, along with Mk. 06, Mk. 09 and Evangelion 13. This would explain the cross, but is there any other evidence to this conclusion? The only other thing I can think of is the fact that Unit-05 has no arms and legs, it's arms are robotic and in place of its legs are it's spider-like wheeled legs. The Adam that became Mk. 06 was launched onto the moon, one of the Adams was launched as far as Tokyo, and the Adam that became Evangelion 13 was in incubation until the events of 3.33 possibly due to damage sustained during the Second Impact. So it's not that hard to imagine that the fourth Adam was so damaged it lost its arms and legs. What do you guys think? EDIT: I was wrong, there was a cross at Unit-04s explosion, so that's got me thinking the crosses may be signs of an S2 engine, which I'm pretty sure is common knowledge :/ But still, I think my theory holds some water.

[]:             Quote Post by ProjectFreelancer64 » Wed Jan 29, 2014 6:50 pm Interesting idea but I don't think Anno and Khara would just gloss over what someone would assume would be a pretty important plot detail in a quick action scene. But who knows, maybe they can quickly tie it in in FINAL/4.0 somehow without feeling ridiculous. Regardless, something was definitely intriguing about Provisional Unit-05.

[]: Re: Was Unit-05 one of the ADAMS?             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 30, 2014 1:36 am The cross explosions aren't correlated with dead Angels though. We see cross explosions all over the place; Unit-02 even unleashes one in EoE upon awakening in the lake. In Rebuild, rainbows are what are associated with dead Angels. The cross explosions are mostly just fancy explosions associated with Angels and Evas alike.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Jan 30, 2014 3:50 am I should look at the Blu-Ray again for confirmation, but wasn't there a second rainbow too, above the first one and much more faded?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 30, 2014 6:35 am The cross explosion during the 4th Angel attack in Jo means that crosses don't correlate only with dead angels. Asuka killed an angel in Ha so hard that a double-rainbow appeared in the sky. (This after the angel created 10 cross explosions even before Asuka engaged it.) So the crosses and number of rainbows aren't related to angel or eva rank as far as we can tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Jan 31, 2014 6:41 am Yeah this whole thing was just a passing thought, plus I was trying to think of why Unit-05 had no arms and legs. Plus thinking about it further an equal, if not greater, case could be made for Unit-03 being the fourth Adam, what with being able to move by itself (although that could be an S2 Engine, although although Unit-04 had just blown up because of one), and the fact that it has a second pair of arms, like the Adam that became Evangelion 13, although 13 seemingly grew those arms with in it's "womb" so that it could wield the two Lances, while Unit-03 grew its arms there and then.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 31, 2014 7:58 am Th3Marauder wrote: Yeah this whole thing was just a passing thought, plus I was trying to think of why Unit-05 had no arms and legs.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Jan 31, 2014 8:06 am Yeah, very true. Just from my counting only 3 of the ADAMs are accounted for, unless two of them were used to make Evangelion 13, hence the four arms, or one of them is the Key of Nebuchadnezzar. Oh well, it was a nice dream I had once :P

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 31, 2014 9:43 am ^ Only 2 of the ADAMs are accounted for : EVA-13 and Mark.06.(well, 98% sure for the latter) As for the two remaining ones, it's only speculation : - the Key of Nebuchadnezzar, making a parallel with Adam reduced to an embryo in NGE. - EVA-01, based on what appears to be a third eye in its Radiant Giant form at the end of 2.0, but it could also be its head chakra glowing, since the others chakra were also glowing during that scene. Another theory is that its made from Lilith's flesh like in NGE. - Mark.09, depending of what the hell being an "ADAMs' Vessel" means. Maybe it's a "different" one from the three others and can't be used to trigger an Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Jan 31, 2014 12:14 pm Only 2 of the ADAMs are accounted for : EVA-13 and Mark.06.(well, 98% sure for the latter)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 31, 2014 12:38 pm We only know that Mark.09 is tied to the ADAMs, we don't know if it's one of them. As for Rei Q "becoming" the ADAMs' Vessel, according to the official translations what Mari meant was that Rei Q risked to be absorbed by the Mark.09 if she stayed too long inside it, apparently she already saw it in the past, meaning that Mark.09 has a nasty habit to try to absorb its pilot in its core.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Jan 31, 2014 3:42 pm Wow, I actually never noticed the double crosses before Thanks for pointing that out.
summary: []: Was Unit-05 one of the ADAMS?             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Jan 29, 2014 2:16 pm Rewatching 2.22 I realised I'd never given much thought to this shot Two crosses; one for the Third Angel, one for Unit-05? Thinking about it, no other destroyed Eva; in the original show not Unit-00 or Unit-02, and not in the Rebuild with Unit-04. So why the two crosses? Unit-05 is one of the four ADAMS, along with Mk. 06, Mk. 09 and Evan
